content.en:
"What's the matter, the True Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws has mastered the power of the Dark Taboo, and his children have also mastered the power of the Dark Taboo, this is too much of a coincidence, right? Could it be that he has a treasure in his hand that can make people give birth to the power of the Dark Taboo?"

The Golden Light Sword Venerable looked at Ye Tian and guessed.

But even if he guessed, there was no way, he was not Ye Tian's opponent, even dozens of invincible true ancestors couldn't beat Ye Tian.

The combat ability of the Supreme True Ancestor is not only terrifying, but also durable, with endless origin power, it can break out into battle, and cast forbidden techniques again and again, when there is no exhaustion at all.

And these invincible true ancestors couldn't do such a thing, once they fought with Ye Tian, they would all be killed by Ye Tian.

Therefore, no invincible true ancestor dared to fight Ye Tian's idea.

At this time, Ye Xingchen and Flash Sword Venerable were constantly fighting.

Although both of them are Supreme True Ancestors, Ye Xingchen has a forbidden body, and his foundation is much stronger than that of the Flash Sword Venerable, and the Supreme True Ancestor like the Flash Sword Venerable is completely a parallel import, and after a few attacks from the Supreme True Ancestor, he will wilt.

Moreover, the defense of the Flash Sword Venerable could not reach the average level of the Supreme True Ancestor, it was only that the attack power had reached the level of the Supreme True Ancestor, and strictly speaking, such a Supreme True Ancestor was undoubtedly the weakest kind of Supreme True Ancestor.

As a result, the Flash Sword Venerable was completely suppressed by Ye Xingchen.

Under normal circumstances, it would take a long time for the two Supreme True Ancestors to fight before they could decide whether they would be able to die or die, but Ye Xingchen's forbidden power injured the Flash Sword Venerable again and again, and the recovery speed of the Flash Sword Venerable was too slow, and the injury became more and more serious.

And because the Flash Sword Venerable was a supreme true ancestor who was raised by pulling out seedlings, he had too few means, so he couldn't get rid of Ye Xingchen's attack at all, and he was injured again and again.

As the injury worsened, the sequelae caused by the forcible promotion of the Flash Sword Venerable began to erupt, the breath of life began to drop greatly, and the whole person quickly declined.

This was a situation that should not have happened to the True Ancestor, but it appeared in the Flash Sword Venerable.

Seeing this scene, the Golden Light Sword Venerable was extremely angry.

The Heavenly Sword Sect has also cultivated such a supreme true ancestor, it's not that they don't want to cultivate more, but there are too few people who are willing, and the price paid is not small, if the price is not small, wouldn't it be a force that can cultivate a bunch of supreme true ancestors?

Even the strongest True Ancestor, who didn't live long, could burst out with terrifying strength in a great war, which was enough to reverse the balance of power between the two forces.

But in fact, no matter how much the Heavenly Sword Sect cultivates, it will cultivate at most a few, and the price is too great, so it is not very worthwhile.

Moreover, they had always believed that cultivating a Supreme True Ancestor would be enough.

Unexpectedly, before this entered the forbidden treasure land, it was going to be lost in the selection.

The Golden Light Sword Venerable now only hopes that the selection of 100,000 True Ancestors will end, in that case, Ye Xingchen will not be able to kill the Flash Sword Venerable.

But he just glanced at it, there were still a million True Ancestors left in the world, and I was afraid it would take a long time to end.

Time passed little by little, and the Flash Sword Venerable was a little desperate, his injuries were too serious to hold on.

But he still has one more chance, but it's also the last.

"The Heavenly Sword Sect has given me a medium forbidden strange object, which can burst out with a forbidden blow, if it is used well, it may be able to directly hit Ye Xingchen with a heavy blow!"

Soon, a great opportunity came!

Taking advantage of the opportunity when he was pierced by Ye Xingchen's spear, he urged that forbidden strange object.

I saw a leaf-like forbidden strange object fly out of the hand of the Flash Sword Venerable, turning into a ray of light that instantly pierced through Ye Xingchen.

The speed of this blow was too fast, and it locked on Ye Xingchen, and it was almost difficult for Xeon True Ancestor to dodge this blow.

However.

A forbidden strange object on Ye Xingchen's body automatically turned into a forbidden armor, which instantly protected him, and although the forbidden blow that burst out of the flash sword venerable still penetrated the forbidden armor on Ye Xingchen's body, there was not much strength left, and it was easily blocked by the forbidden body.

Seeing this scene, the Flash Sword Venerable was completely desperate.

"That's right, he is the son and son of the True Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, how can he not have a forbidden and strange object of the defensive type?"

Flash Sword Venerable laughed to himself.

Abrupt.

His body was directly shattered by Ye Xingchen's Star Dao Technique, and one after another forbidden spears were nailed to his remnants, completely shattering his last trace of vitality.

At this point, the Flash Sword Venerable has completely fallen.

He was also the only Supreme True Ancestor to fall this time!

On the other side, Ye Xingyue also burst out with the strength of the strongest true ancestor, killing all sides, and no one dared to provoke her.

After a while, Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue gathered together and joined hands to almost sweep everything.

I don't know how long it has been, and the voice of Hebo True Ancestor came.

"One hundred thousand True Ancestors have been decided, all True Ancestors have stopped!"

Hebo Zhenzu said.

Whoa!!

A True Ancestor flew out of the world, some were seriously injured, some were relaxed, and some were full of fighting intent and covered in blood......

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue flew to Ye Tian's side and said, "Father!"

"That's right, it didn't disappoint me!"

Ye Tian nodded with satisfaction.

One hundred thousand True Ancestors have been selected, but some True Ancestors are seriously injured and need time to heal, but it is impossible to give too much time.

After all, there are many true ancestors who are activated by using forbidden arts, and their lifespan is not much, and once the time drags on, the combat effectiveness will become a problem.

So, after a year, everyone must enter the treasure trove of the taboo.

A year is not a long time, and the True Ancestors have not left the City of Ten Thousand Ancestors, just waiting here silently.

In the blink of an eye, a year has passed.

this day.

One hundred thousand True Ancestors went to the Forbidden Treasure Land, and one level after another was opened, and the blockade was lifted.

This forbidden treasure land is a forest land, covering a continent of the King Kong True Country, the entire forest is filled with the breath of forbidden power, those trees are not ordinary trees, under the influence of forbidden power, they have become very precious trees, and a small number of trees can be used to forge weapons, containing a trace of forbidden attributes!

Bang!!!

One hundred thousand True Ancestors burst out in unison, tearing through the barrier of this forbidden forest and entering the forbidden forest.

Soon, they encountered the first forbidden bloodline creatures.

The fight has begun!

Since there were more True Ancestors who entered this time, they directly crushed those forbidden bloodline creatures, and one by one the forbidden bloodline creatures were killed.

Ye Xingchen was also fighting with a forbidden bloodline creature for the first time, but he also knew that this forbidden bloodline creature was of high value, so he did his best to kill the forbidden bloodline creature one by one, and then put it into the inner world.

Of course.

He hasn't forgotten the purpose of his trip - the Natal Talent Tree!

Whoa!!

A True Ancestor quickly flew towards the Natal Talent Tree, which was very large, far surpassing the other giant trees, and the forbidden aura that permeated the entire Forbidden Treasure Land was very recognizable.

In a short period of time, many True Ancestors approached the Natal Talent Tree.

I saw that near the natal talent tree, there were a number of forbidden bloodline creatures crawling, among which there were three forbidden bloodline creatures that were the most powerful, and their breath was very close to the invincible true ancestor, and they were the top supreme true ancestors.

One-on-one, none of the True Ancestors present were their opponents, and the only advantage was the large number of people.

"3,000 forbidden bloodline creatures, 3 top-notch Supreme True Ancestor-level forbidden bloodline creatures!"

Ye Xingchen frowned.

This battle is not easy to fight!

Although there were many of them, there were 100,000 True Ancestors, but the quality level was not too high, and the forbidden bloodline creatures had a long-lasting combat power, which was difficult to kill, and most of them were equivalent to elite-level Extreme True Ancestors, and there were many comparable to top True Ancestors.

Of course, they didn't have to kill all these forbidden bloodline creatures, they just had to snatch the natal talent fruit.

"Let's go!"

A Supreme True Ancestor spoke.

There's no time to waste, and if you wait slowly, nothing will come of it.

They had no choice but to rush forward, fight with these forbidden bloodline creatures, break through the blockade, and come to the natal talent tree to pick the natal talent fruit.

Bang!!!!!

One hundred thousand true ancestors made a move, fighting against three thousand bloodline creatures.

And the three most powerful forbidden bloodline creatures also made a move, and directly killed a group of true ancestors in seconds.

Forbidden bloodline creatures can basically use the power of the bloodline that contains a trace of dark forbidden power, although it can't be compared to the real dark forbidden power, but it is also very terrifying.

In a short period of time, less than a hundred Forbidden Bloodline Creatures had fallen, but the True Ancestors had fallen no less than three thousand.

At this rate, the True Ancestors would suffer heavy losses.

At this time, there was a Supreme True Ancestor who went crazy and tried to break through the blockade and snatch the Natal Talent Fruit.
